title: tilia leptophylla
intro: Tilia leptophylla, also known as the small-leaved lime or small-leaved linden tree, is a deciduous tree species native to the Balkan Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Tilia leptophylla come from its flowers, leaves, and bark, which contain flavonoids, tannins, and essential oils with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tilia leptophylla include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote sleep, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Tilia leptophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to soothe the nervous system and promote relaxation.
